tasks.label: stop daemon
tasks.detail: Kill any running autopilotd so the next launch starts a fresh binary.

tasks.label: daemon
tasks.detail: Build + run the real autopilotd on the autopilot socket (background). Loads sandbox/.env (GROQ_API_KEY, ZSH_AUTOPILOT_* overrides) if present; echo mode when no key.
tasks.command: set -a; [ -f sandbox/.env ] && . sandbox/.env; set +a; make daemon && ./bin/autopilotd -socket /tmp/zsh-autopilot.sock -v

tasks.label: sandbox: prep
tasks.detail: Build, kill any stale daemon, then start a fresh autopilotd before opening the sandbox shell.
